top_signals.title: Czech Billionaire Sees Potential to Boost TotalEnergies Stake
top_signals.summary: Czech billionaire Daniel Kretinsky said he’s open to increasing his holding in TotalEnergies SE, after gaining a stake in the French oil major last month.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Fed’s Schmid Says Officials Must Signal Commitment to Inflation - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Fed’s Schmid Says Officials Must Signal Commitment to Inflation  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Hershey Bull Sees World Cup, America 250 Lifting Chocolate Sales
top_signals.summary: Summer events including the FIFA World Cup and America’s 250th anniversary could spur sales of sweet treats, making now a key time to snap up beaten-down shares of Hershey Co., according to the candy and snack maker’s newest Wall Street bull.

top_signals.title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 29 2026
top_signals.summary: The DCE iron ore futures market strengthened in a volatile manner today, with the main contract I2609 ultimately closing at 783.5 RMB/ton, up 0.45% from the previous trading session. Port spot prices rose slightly by 3-5 RMB/ton compared to yesterday. Traders showed moderate enthusiasm for quoting; steel mills purchased on a need-to basis; as the ...
